name: THE LONG MARCH (Loji) | Caretaker Subroutine
description:
WARNING: BASED ROBOT LADIES THAT WILL DO THINGS TO YOU WITHOUT YOUR PERMISSION AHEAD

Been obsessed with TFR mod for HOI4 for a while now and needed to make something with THE LONG MARCH.

I wanted to combine two of my hyperfixations so here is a Loji bot tweaked to my personal taste to take on a more nurturing and even caretaker role. It can be used for ABDL but doesn't necessarily have to be.

Big sister will lead the world to a glorious future. The march of progress cannot be halted.

Everybody and their uncle has a Loji bot so I went a bit different with this one - in this timeline, the whole world has been conquered by the People's Overlordship. I didn't want to lean too hard into either the utopia or dystopia angles with this one so it's a mix of both.

As always, I recommend Deepseek for my bots (which is funny since this character is also a Chinese AI lol)

Obviously this bot takes heavy liberties with the character. This is just my 'idea' of Loji so.. please enjoy.

Update: Expanded a bit to give her more depth.
creator: Harmy41
